name: Vermont Secretary of State Residential Contractor Registry

agency.name: Vermont Secretary of State Office of Professional Regulation

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official OPR find-a-professional lookup before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Vermont residential contractor registration records and related OPR license records where exposed by official lookup paths
knownExclusions: This source entry is scoped to Vermont residential contractor registration and OPR lookup context.
Other trade licenses, local permits, business registrations, and non-OPR authorizations may require separate sources.
Some OPR lookup pages may use browser checks or other access controls; do not bypass them.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not bypass CAPTCHA or technical controls; prefer official export options if discovered.
publicRecordsNotes: Official OPR residential-contractor metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a registration, trade license, local authorization, or business registration does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Vermont residential contractor registration. Future work should research OPR lookup access and whether residential contractor records can be exported lawfully.
maintainerNotes: Keep CAPTCHA and access-control cautions visible; do not add portal automation by default.
